requirement_topic.en: Namibia Market Access — NSI Conformity, ECB Regulation, and Project-Specific Approval
requirement_topic.zh: 纳米比亚市场准入——NSI合格评定、ECB监管及项目专属审批
requirement_topic.zht: 納米比亞市場准入——NSI合格評定、ECB監管及項目專屬審批

summary.en: NSI is Namibia's national standards body and provides standardization and conformity assessment services. ECB regulates Namibia's electricity sector, while NamPower is the national state-owned power utility with generation, transmission, supply, trading, and bulk-supply functions. For EV chargers, no single official Namibia whole-unit mandatory EVSE certification rule was confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14. The practical market-access path is therefore product and project specific: verify NSI regulated-product scope and IEC-based standards, verify ECB treatment where the charging activity involves electricity supply, resale, generation, distribution, or network operation, and obtain NamPower, RED, municipal, site-owner, and electrical-contractor acceptance before energisation.
summary.zh: NSI是纳米比亚国家标准机构，提供标准化及合格评定服务。ECB监管纳米比亚电力行业，NamPower是国家国有电力公用事业单位，承担发电、输电、供电、交易及批发供电职能。对于电动汽车充电桩，截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方来源确认纳米比亚存在单一EVSE整机强制认证规则。因此，实际市场准入路径取决于产品和项目：核实NSI受监管产品范围及IEC体系标准；当充电活动涉及供电、转售、发电、配电或网络运营时核实ECB处理；并在通电前取得NamPower、RED、市政、场地方和电气承包商接受。
summary.zht: NSI是納米比亞國家標準機構，提供標準化及合格評定服務。ECB監管納米比亞電力行業，NamPower是國家國有電力公用事業單位，承擔發電、輸電、供電、交易及批發供電職能。對於電動汽車充電樁，截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方來源確認納米比亞存在單一EVSE整機強制認證規則。因此，實際市場准入路徑取決於產品和項目：核實NSI受監管產品範圍及IEC體系標準；當充電活動涉及供電、轉售、發電、配電或網絡運營時核實ECB處理；並在通電前取得NamPower、RED、市政、場地方和電氣承包商接受。

standards_or_laws: NSI standards and conformity assessment services
NamPower generation, transmission, supply, trading, and bulk-supply mandate
NamPower, RED, municipal, site-owner, and electrical-contractor project acceptance
IEC 61851, IEC 62196, and IEC 61000 as expected international technical references where adopted or specified

summary.en: China-market chargers are documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connectors, and GB/T 27930 communication for DC systems, with China domestic certification or project acceptance where applicable. China CCC, GB/T reports, and Chinese operator approvals can support engineering review but do not establish Namibia NSI conformity status, ECB treatment, NamPower/RED acceptance, or site-owner approval.
summary.zh: 中国市场充电桩通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口及直流系统GB/T 27930通信准备文件，并在适用时满足中国国内认证或项目验收。中国CCC、GB/T报告及中国运营商批准可支持工程审查，但不能证明纳米比亚NSI合格评定状态、ECB处理、NamPower/RED接受或场地方批准。
summary.zht: 中國市場充電樁通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口及直流系統GB/T 27930通訊準備文件，並在適用時滿足中國國內認證或項目驗收。中國CCC、GB/T報告及中國運營商批准可支持工程審查，但不能證明納米比亞NSI合格評定狀態、ECB處理、NamPower/RED接受或場地方批准。

gap.en: Exporters should map the importer, HS code, charger type, rated voltage, radio or payment functions, coupler type, IEC safety and EMC reports, English labels and manuals, installation contractor, utility connection route, and any electricity resale or network-operation model before claiming Namibia readiness. Confirm NSI regulated-product scope and ECB requirements directly for the specific product and project.
gap.zh: 出口商在宣称满足纳米比亚要求前，应明确进口商、HS编码、充电桩类型、额定电压、无线或支付功能、耦合器类型、IEC安全及EMC报告、英文标签和说明书、安装承包商、公用事业接入路径，以及任何电力转售或网络运营模式。应针对具体产品和项目直接确认NSI受监管产品范围及ECB要求。
gap.zht: 出口商在宣稱滿足納米比亞要求前，應明確進口商、HS編碼、充電樁類型、額定電壓、無線或支付功能、耦合器類型、IEC安全及EMC報告、英文標籤和說明書、安裝承包商、公用事業接入路徑，以及任何電力轉售或網絡運營模式。應針對具體產品和項目直接確認NSI受監管產品範圍及ECB要求。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional and project-specific — NSI conformity, ECB treatment, NamPower/RED connection, municipal approval, and site-owner requirements depend on product configuration and charging business model; no single official national whole-unit EVSE rule was confirmed as of 2026-06-14
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic certification and GB/T evidence are not Namibia market-access approvals

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not claim automatic Namibia market access from China CCC, GB/T reports, or China operator approvals. Confirm NSI scope, ECB treatment, NamPower/RED or municipal connection requirements, and site-owner specifications for the exact charger and business model before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应凭中国CCC、GB/T报告或中国运营商批准宣称自动满足纳米比亚市场准入。出货前请针对具体充电桩和商业模式确认NSI范围、ECB处理、NamPower/RED或市政接入要求及场地方规格。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應憑中國CCC、GB/T報告或中國運營商批准宣稱自動滿足納米比亞市場准入。出貨前請針對具體充電樁和商業模式確認NSI範圍、ECB處理、NamPower/RED或市政接入要求及場地方規格。

requirement_topic.en: Namibia EV Market Context — Nascent Demand, Long Distances, Solar Charging, and High Ambient Temperature
requirement_topic.zh: 纳米比亚EV市场背景——早期需求、长距离、太阳能充电及高环境温度
requirement_topic.zht: 納米比亞EV市場背景——早期需求、長距離、太陽能充電及高環境溫度

summary.en: Namibia's EV market and public charging infrastructure remain early-stage compared with mature EV markets. Long intercity distances, remote tourist routes, mining and logistics sites, and sparse population density make charger location, reliability, service access, and energy management more important than headline charger count. Namibia's strong solar resource makes solar-assisted charging and charging integrated with PV and storage attractive, especially for remote or high-tariff sites, but solar integration adds additional grid, protection, storage, and utility approval work. High ambient temperatures, dust, and solar exposure require careful enclosure selection, cooling, derating, maintenance access, and spare-parts planning.
summary.zh: 与成熟EV市场相比，纳米比亚EV市场和公共充电基础设施仍处早期。城际距离长、偏远旅游路线、矿业和物流场站以及人口密度较低，使充电桩选址、可靠性、服务可达性和能源管理比单纯充电桩数量更重要。纳米比亚太阳能资源优越，使太阳能辅助充电及与光伏和储能集成的充电方案具备吸引力，尤其适用于偏远或高电价场站，但太阳能集成会增加电网、保护、储能和公用事业审批工作。高环境温度、粉尘和太阳直晒要求谨慎选择外壳、冷却、降额、维护通道和备件计划。
summary.zht: 與成熟EV市場相比，納米比亞EV市場和公共充電基礎設施仍處早期。城際距離長、偏遠旅遊路線、礦業和物流場站以及人口密度較低，使充電樁選址、可靠性、服務可達性和能源管理比單純充電樁數量更重要。納米比亞太陽能資源優越，使太陽能輔助充電及與光伏和儲能集成的充電方案具備吸引力，尤其適用於偏遠或高電價場站，但太陽能集成會增加電網、保護、儲能和公用事業審批工作。高環境溫度、粉塵和太陽直曬要求謹慎選擇外殼、冷卻、降額、維護通道和備件計畫。

standards_or_laws: NamPower and RED project connection requirements for charger sites
ECB regulatory treatment for generation, supply, distribution, and resale models
NSI conformity and IEC evidence where standards are adopted or specified
Project-owner requirements for solar-assisted charging, storage, mining, logistics, tourism, and fleet applications

summary.en: China's EV charging market is large, dense, and supported by mature domestic GB/T infrastructure and domestic service networks. That experience does not automatically translate to Namibia, where sparse routes, solar-linked sites, limited maintenance coverage, and project-specific utility approval can dominate procurement decisions. China domestic field performance should be supplemented with Namibia climate, route, and serviceability evidence.
summary.zh: 中国EV充电市场规模大、密度高，并由成熟的国内GB/T基础设施和国内服务网络支撑。这一经验不能自动转化到纳米比亚；在纳米比亚，稀疏路线、太阳能关联场站、有限维护覆盖和项目专属公用事业审批可能主导采购决策。中国国内现场业绩应补充纳米比亚气候、路线和可维护性证据。
summary.zht: 中國EV充電市場規模大、密度高，並由成熟的國內GB/T基礎設施和國內服務網絡支撐。這一經驗不能自動轉化到納米比亞；在納米比亞，稀疏路線、太陽能關聯場站、有限維護覆蓋和項目專屬公用事業審批可能主導採購決策。中國國內現場業績應補充納米比亞氣候、路線和可維護性證據。

standards_or_laws: China domestic GB/T charging infrastructure practice

gap.en: Namibia procurement should not be approached as a simple plug-and-ship EVSE sale. Suppliers should include route and site assessment, solar/PV-storage interface review where relevant, temperature derating curves, dust and ingress protection evidence, remote diagnostics, spare parts, installer training, and service response planning. These commercial and environmental issues are not solved by China GB/T compliance alone.
gap.zh: 纳米比亚采购不应按简单即插即发货的EVSE销售处理。供应商应包括路线及场站评估、相关时的太阳能/光储接口审查、温度降额曲线、防尘及防护证据、远程诊断、备件、安装方培训和服务响应计划。这些商业和环境问题不能仅凭中国GB/T合规解决。
gap.zht: 納米比亞採購不應按簡單即插即發貨的EVSE銷售處理。供應商應包括路線及場站評估、相關時的太陽能/光儲接口審查、溫度降額曲線、防塵及防護證據、遠程診斷、備件、安裝方培訓和服務響應計畫。這些商業和環境問題不能僅憑中國GB/T合規解決。

mandatory_status.target: Market and project context — not itself a mandatory product standard; technical, utility, ECB, NSI, and site-owner requirements remain separate gates
mandatory_status.cn: China EV market experience is supporting commercial evidence only and does not affect Namibia conformity or project obligations

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Namibia's early EV market, long-distance routes, strong solar resource, and harsh outdoor conditions create opportunity but also require site-specific engineering. Treat solar charging, high-temperature derating, serviceability, and utility approval as procurement-critical items, not optional extras.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 纳米比亚早期EV市场、长距离路线、优越太阳能资源和严苛户外条件创造机会，但也要求场站专属工程设计。应将太阳能充电、高温降额、可维护性和公用事业审批视为采购关键项，而非可选附加项。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 納米比亞早期EV市場、長距離路線、優越太陽能資源和嚴苛戶外條件創造機會，但也要求場站專屬工程設計。應將太陽能充電、高溫降額、可維護性和公用事業審批視為採購關鍵項，而非可選附加項。
